title: My Sister Stole My Wedding Deposit, Nixed My Venue, Lied I Cheated. So I Watched Her Lose Her Home.
description: My sister secretly canceled my $15K wedding venue, pocketed the deposit for her Bora Bora honeymoon, and told everyone I cheated. Five years later, she begged for a loan to buy her dream home. I gave her one at 25% interest, and after a missed payment, I foreclosed, sold the house, and mailed her the itemized bill. #Revenge #Karma #FamilyBetrayal
thumb_text: SHE STOLE MY WEDDING VENUE. I FORECLOSED ON HER DREAM HOME.

thumb_lines.text: I LENT HER THE MONEY AT 25% INTEREST
